name: Green Bean, Yellow Pepper, and Bacon Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small yellow bell pepper, cut into paper-thin strips
6 slices lean bacon, cooked until crisp and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle of boiling water, cook the green beans for 2 to 4 minutes, or until they are crisp-tender. Drain them and refresh in a bowl of ice and cold water.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the vinegar, mustard, and crumbled oregano. Add the olive oil slowly, whisking until emulsified.
3. To the vinaigrette, add the cooked beans (drained well), yellow bell pepper strips, and bacon (crumbled). Toss the salad and season with salt and black pepper.
4. The salad may be made up to 8 hours in advance.
